narrative:
Carey City has 2,299 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
